title: CLASSIFIER output — subrequests + class + confidence + confirmation questions

is_compound.description: true when request spans >1 class or >1 distinct work-order

needs_confirmation.description: true iff confidence < threshold OR compound OR any subrequest unplaybooked

subrequests.description: atomic subrequests; each SR* stable, never renumbered

id.description: stable subrequest id; SR1, SR2, … never renumbered on re-run

text.description: faithfully-scoped slice of request; strip only connective tissue, never scope-bearing words

class.description: one of the nine request classes

confidence.description: classifier confidence for this subrequest's class assignment

reason.description: words in request that drove this class

question.description: recognition-framed question about class or decomposition

options.description: list of options; recommended option may be tagged [DEFAULT]

targets.description: uncertain subrequest ids this question resolves

escape.description: null when every subrequest has an authored playbook

items.description: SR id lacking an authored playbook

unplaybooked_subrequests.description: SR ids whose class still lacks an authored playbook

note.description: explanation of why pipeline must halt and what is unplaybooked
